---
title: "Introduction"
---

## Background

Pull from your `dataimago-spec.yaml`'s `vertical.dissertation.thesis.background`
for intellectual + personal context. Two or three paragraphs covering both
the intellectual genealogy (what work led you here, what scholarly conversations
you're joining) and the personal / practical motivation (why this question,
why now, why you).

## Research question

Pull from your `dataimago-spec.yaml`'s
`vertical.dissertation.thesis.researchQuestion`. State the question(s)
precisely — well-formed, with appropriate scope, identifying what's empirical
/ theoretical / methodological.

## Contribution

Pull from your `dataimago-spec.yaml`'s `vertical.dissertation.thesis.contribution`.
State the contribution clearly. If you have multiple contributions, distinguish
them (theoretical / methodological / empirical / practical) in a numbered list.

## Roadmap

This dissertation proceeds as follows. Chapter 2 reviews the relevant literature.
Chapter 3 details the methodology. Chapter 4 presents the results. Chapter 5
discusses implications. Chapter 6 concludes.
